title: HLL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: HLL Lifecare (HLL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Financial Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official HLL website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD as per Government of India directives.

qualification.education_qualification: CA / ICWA, Post Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management from recognized University
qualification.details: CA / ICWA (Essential) Post Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management from a recognized University (Desirable)

salary_details.details: Rs. 36600-62000/- (E6 grade) (Pre-Revised) Annual CTC Rs. 21.70 lakhs (approx.)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HLL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HLL CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position at HLL Lifecare is 03-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential educational qualifications for the CFO role?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post is CA / ICWA.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any desirable qualification for the CFO position?
faq.answer: Yes, a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Management from a recognized University is considered a desirable qualification for the CFO role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position is 50 years as of 01-05-2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the HLL CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the CFO post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post is Rs. 36600 - 62000 Per Month, with an approximate annual CTC of Rs. 21.70 lakhs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the HLL CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post includes Shortlisting, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through both permanent and deputation basis?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post is mentioned as Permanent / Deputation Basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
